Gaja Kesari Yoga.name: Gaja Kesari Yoga
Gaja Kesari Yoga.description: Formed when Jupiter is in a quadrant (Kendra) from the Moon.
Gaja Kesari Yoga.explanation: Jupiter is in house 5 and the Moon is in house 1, forming an auspicious Kendra relationship (4 houses apart). This grants wisdom, reputation, prosperity, and magnetic leadership.

Budhaditya Yoga.name: Budhaditya Yoga
Budhaditya Yoga.description: Formed when Sun and Mercury are conjoined in the same zodiac sign.
Budhaditya Yoga.explanation: Sun is in Libra and Mercury is in Taurus. They are not conjoined, so this yoga is not active.

Hamsa Yoga.name: Hamsa Yoga
Hamsa Yoga.description: One of the 5 great planetary combinations formed when Jupiter is in Kendra in its own or exalted sign.
Hamsa Yoga.explanation: This yoga requires Jupiter to be in its own sign or exalted in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th). Currently, Jupiter is in house 5 in Scorpio. Therefore, this yoga is inactive.

Malavya Yoga.name: Malavya Yoga
Malavya Yoga.description: One of the 5 great planetary combinations formed when Venus is in Kendra in its own or exalted sign.
Malavya Yoga.explanation: This yoga requires Venus to be in its own sign or exalted in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th). Currently, Venus is in house 5 in Scorpio. Therefore, this yoga is inactive.

Ruchaka Yoga.name: Ruchaka Yoga
Ruchaka Yoga.description: One of the 5 great planetary combinations formed when Mars is in Kendra in its own or exalted sign.
Ruchaka Yoga.explanation: This yoga requires Mars to be in its own sign or exalted in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th). Currently, Mars is in house 10 in Aries. This is fully active! It grants the noble qualities of Mars at their maximum potential, leading to outstanding wealth, renown, and character.

Bhadra Yoga.name: Bhadra Yoga
Bhadra Yoga.description: One of the 5 great planetary combinations formed when Mercury is in Kendra in its own or exalted sign.
Bhadra Yoga.explanation: This yoga requires Mercury to be in its own sign or exalted in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th). Currently, Mercury is in house 11 in Taurus. Therefore, this yoga is inactive.

Sasa Yoga.name: Sasa Yoga
Sasa Yoga.description: One of the 5 great planetary combinations formed when Saturn is in Kendra in its own or exalted sign.
Sasa Yoga.explanation: This yoga requires Saturn to be in its own sign or exalted in a Kendra house (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th). Currently, Saturn is in house 2 in Leo. Therefore, this yoga is inactive.
